description: Internal Link Audit Score: A global site-wide internal link health score with monthly comparison. Shows overall link health (0-100), broken down by: orphan page ratio, average links per page, link equity distribution, broken links ratio, silo coverage. Stores monthly snapshots for trend comparison.
steps: 1. Add new methods to viraseo/includes/Features/InternalSilo.php: (a) `compute_link_health(): array` - calculates the global link health score (0-100) based on weighted factors: orphan_ratio (pages with 0 inlinks / total), avg_inlinks (average incoming links per page), distribution_score (how evenly link equity is spread - penalize if top 5 pages have >80% of all links), broken_ratio (broken links / total links), coverage (% of pages that have both in and out links). Returns score + breakdown per factor. (b) AJAX `viraseo_link_health` - returns current health score + factor breakdown + comparison with last month. (c) AJAX `viraseo_link_health_snapshot` - saves current metrics as a monthly snapshot in option `viraseo_link_health_history` (array of {date, score, factors}). Called automatically after scan. (d) AJAX `viraseo_link_health_history` - returns all monthly snapshots for trend chart.

2. Update the `scan()` method in InternalSilo.php to automatically compute and store a link health snapshot after each scan completes. Store in wp_options as `viraseo_link_health_history` (JSON array of monthly data points).

3. Update viraseo/templates/admin/links.php: Add a new tab 'سلامت لینک‌ها' (Link Health) with: (a) Large health score display (circular gauge or big number with color). (b) Factor breakdown cards showing each component score. (c) Monthly trend chart (simple bar/spark chart). (d) Comparison badge showing improvement/decline vs last month. (e) Action items based on weak factors.

4. Update viraseo/assets/js/admin.js: (a) Add handler to load link health score on tab activation. (b) Render the score gauge, factor cards, and monthly trend visualization. (c) Show comparison with previous month (green arrow up / red arrow down).
5. Update viraseo/assets/css/admin.css: Styles for the health score gauge, factor cards, trend chart, and comparison badges.
acceptance_criteria: Link health score is computed from 5 factors: orphan ratio, avg inlinks, distribution, broken ratio, coverage
Monthly snapshots stored in wp_options for historical comparison
New tab 'Link Health' appears in the links page template
JS renders score + factor breakdown + monthly comparison
findings: Implementation complete. compute_link_health() computes weighted score from 5 factors. AJAX viraseo_link_health returns score+factors+comparison. viraseo_link_health_history returns all snapshots. Snapshot auto-recorded in scan() (max 1/day). JS loads health data on page init and after scan. Health tab added to links template with score display, factor cards, trend chart, and action items.
